overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from an open pedestrian plaza with palm trees and outdoor cafés, ascends stairs through a concrete tunnel, and emerges onto a busy multi-lane street with flying cars and massive digital billboards under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with palm trees and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward the central seating area

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading to upper level
large rectangular planter with tall palm trees
tall vertical digital billboard displaying 'EL GANGSTER' text
large horizontal billboard with 'DARRA' text and weapon advertisement
tall futuristic skyscraper with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, open urban plaza with concrete ground. Large digital billboards adorn the buildings, and a wide staircase leads up on the right. Palm trees in planters line the walkway as the camera moves forward through the sparse crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor café and food cart market area

events.description: entering the outdoor seating area with plastic chairs and food stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating between plastic tables and food carts in the market area

notable_agents.action: sitting at a white plastic table near the red food cart

entered.detail: red food cart with orange canopy and grilled food display
red plastic chairs arranged around white tables
blue plastic chairs around tables with umbrellas
blue and yellow food cart with multicolored umbrella

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered outdoor café area with colorful plastic chairs and tables. Food carts line the path, and the palm trees recede into the background. The lighting becomes slightly diffused under umbrellas and awnings.

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide concrete staircase
entering the covered concrete tunnel with blue neon lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and walking through the dimly lit concrete tunnel

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase ascending between rough walls
rough concrete walls with graffiti and stains
horizontal blue neon light strip illuminating the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase, leaving the market behind. Entering a tunnel, the environment becomes enclosed with rough concrete walls and a blue neon light strip guiding the way forward. The space is empty and sheltered from the sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street under elevated highway

events.description: exiting the tunnel onto street level with vehicle traffic and overpasses
futuristic vehicles driving past on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to moving traffic under the overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the road
sitting on the ground near yellow construction barriers

entered.detail: asphalt road with red painted curbs and multiple vehicle lanes
elevated highway structure passing over the street
traffic signal showing green light
yellow and black striped concrete barriers
large billboard with 'Wraiths' text and neon pink styling

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens onto a busy urban street with multiple lanes of traffic. Futuristic cars drive past under a massive overpass structure. Digital billboards line the street, and construction barriers sit on the left sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under overpass with large digital advertisements

events.description: crossing the pedestrian crosswalk while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, moving between lanes of traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sports car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: large pink digital billboard with 'WATSON WHORE' text
bright billboard with colorful mask and 'Splish Splash' text
white striped crosswalk markings on the asphalt
piles of garbage bags and debris near the barriers

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper under the overpass where the sky is mostly blocked. Large digital billboards including one for 'Watson Whore' dominate the walls. The camera crosses the pedestrian crosswalk, navigating between waiting vehicles and trash piles on the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open pedestrian plaza into the dense, shadowed underbelly of a futuristic city street. It begins by gliding through a sunlit concrete plaza lined with palm trees and digital billboards before transitioning into a diffused light environment filled with colorful café chairs and food carts. The camera then ascends a wide staircase and enters a stark, enclosed concrete tunnel guided by a blue neon strip, leaving the open market behind. As the camera exits the tunnel, the scene opens onto a bustling multi-lane street with futuristic traffic and massive overpasses under the midday sun. Finally, the view moves deeper beneath the overpass where the sky vanishes, shifting toward towering digital advertisements and cluttered sidewalks as the camera crosses a pedestrian walkway.
